message:
feat: operator overloading for class instances

- Support __iadd__, __add__, etc. for augmented assignment on class instances
- x += 10 on class instance calls x.__iadd__(allocator, 10) or x.__add__(allocator, 10)
- Use @hasDecl for runtime dispatch between __iadd__ and __add__ fallback
- Class instance variables with aug_assign now correctly use 'var' not 'const'
- Fix 'is'/'is not' identity operators for class instances (use pointer comparison)
